source: shared fake-transport timeout planning and shared CommonFakeVirtualClock prototype
description: Pins wall-clock-free timeout checks before retry, notification, or request timeout policy moves into shared runtime code.

expected.commonDecision: Shared runtime timeout tests must advance virtual time deterministically and must not wait for wall-clock protocol constants.

notes: This vector covers shared virtual-time control only. Platform timeout constants, public facade error mapping, and BLE adapter timeout behavior remain platform-owned until a feature-specific runtime slice adds Android and iOS compatibility tests.
